name: style-manager
description: Provides advanced controls for managing themes, CSS snippets, and style settings. Transforms them into adjustable controls, enabling you to save, export or switch between configurations as presets.

scripts.build: node scripts/readme-view-content.mjs && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.clean: npm run prettier && npm run lint:fix
scripts.health: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.release:patch: npm run build && npm run health && npm version patch && npm run bump && npm run release
scripts.release:minor: npm run build && npm run health && npm version minor && npm run bump && npm run release
scripts.release:major: npm run build && npm run health && npm version major && npm run bump && npm run release

author: emarpiee
